source_metadata.title: 2025/11/20 - PP (Part 2)
source_metadata.description:
Thursday 20 December | Primary Production Committee
Hearing of evidence:
Petition of Vegan Society of Aotearoa: Ensure accurate labelling of vegetarian and vegan products and Petition of NZ Vegetarian Society: Ensure Accurate Labelling of Vegetarian and Vegan Products

Vincent Arbuckle, DDG New Zealand Food Safety
Fiona Duncan, Director Regulatory Systems Policy
Mary-Ann Carter, Principal Adviser Food Policy Food Trans-Tasman
